trajectory_goal: Use GPT-5.4 to expand B3 with reusable MuSiQue decomposition and long-hop retrieval skills before later trajectory generation and SFT.
notes: final should preserve the useful B1 to B3 skills while adding stronger decomposition policies for 3-hop and 4-hop questions supported by MuSiQue.
New MuSiQue skills should improve longer-hop planning, checkpointed decomposition, and mid-chain recovery without harming shorter multihop questions.
Prefer additions or targeted refinements that improve long-hop routing, decomposition checkpoints, answer typing, or verification in reusable ways.
